    E

    EndScreen - Class in jogo.screens
    Controller and view class responsible for rendering the game over screen.
    EndScreen(GameSession) - Constructor for class jogo.screens.EndScreen
    Constructs a new EndScreen bound to the finalized session data.
    endTurn() - Method in class jogo.engine.GameSession
    Ends the current player's turn, switching active players and managing day progression.
    ErrorPopUp - Class in jogo.screens
    Utility dialog component responsible for rendering standardized error notifications.
    Events - Class in jogo.engine
    Represents the events that occur throughout the game.
    Events() - Constructor for class jogo.engine.Events
     
    EventsTest - Class in jogo.engine
    Test class for the Events class.
    EventsTest() - Constructor for class jogo.engine.EventsTest
     
    expense - Variable in class jogo.models.Structures.Structures
